textPlain: Surprisingly informative for what is pretty much a press release, learned a good deal about search engines.
Took me too long to realize this wasn't a tool to search for marginalia in scanned manuscripts.

(author)I'm kinda allergic to writing "I did the thing" posts, so I can't help but tryhard and attempt to make them compelling somehow.Writing in this manner is also very helpful in making sense of the work for myself.  Takes a better understanding of the subject to thoroughly explain what you've built than to merely build it.  Sometimes I've gone back and read through one of these updates to just get a refresher on what my thinking was when I built something.
